# Unity Robotics Warehouse asset subset

This directory contains a small, dependency-free subset of the official
Unity Technologies Robotics Warehouse project:

- Source: https://github.com/Unity-Technologies/Robotics-Warehouse
- Source revision: `4a2a506dd48c62bbd1ee5de4eb15ddd679a38e6f`
- Imported files: `Warehouse.fbx`, `ShelvingRackA.fbx`, `ShelvingRackC.fbx`
- License: Apache License 2.0; see `LICENSE.txt`

The original Unity 2020.3 scripts and Perception package dependencies are not
included. The meshes are used with Unity 2022.3 and locally created URP 14
materials.
